title: Understanding your dog
description: GEORGE NEWS - Is your dog driving you up the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Is your dog driving you up the wall with behavioural issues?

Qualified local animal behaviourist George van Huyssteen (DipCABT, CCAB, CABTI, MHERA) of Neuro Paws can give you advice.

As part of an educational drive, he will answer readers' questions once a week, either in George Herald or on the Neuro Paws website and their social platforms. This way it could also help others who are facing similar problems with their pets.

Describe your challenges in a short email and send it to [email protected]. Every week, he will select a question to answer.

Please note that the questions have to be behaviour-related, not medical.

"I need to add that every dog is an individual, just like us humans so that some problems might be particular to one individual dog. We will however do our best to cover most possibilities relating to a certain behaviour," says Van Huyssteen.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
